interaction_phrase: the appointment of Simon Segars, the former-CEO of Arm Holdings, as its new Chair
occurrence_sentence: Australian quantum computing start-up Silicon Quantum Computing (SQC), is delighted to announce the appointment of Simon Segars, the former-CEO of Arm Holdings, as its new Chair (effective 28 January 2024).

SQC also welcomes the appointment of Fiona Pak-Poy, who was announced today as the Australian Government's Shareholder Nominee Board Director by the Honourable Ed Husic MP, Minister for Industry and Science.

Australian quantum computing start-up Silicon Quantum Computing (SQC), is delighted to announce the appointment of Simon Segars, the former-CEO of Arm Holdings, as its new Chair (effective 28 January 2024).
